_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Auto-skip phantom QV gates at item approval

steps.description: Create orch/qv_gate_validator.py (pure validators + auto_skip_phantom_qv_gates) and wire into item_commands.approve and batch_commands.batch_approve
Review S01: validator purity, pattern registry coverage, conservative defaults, hook placement (post-flush, same transaction)
Unit tests per validator pattern + integration tests for iw approve and iw batch-approve auto-skip behaviour (semantic correctness, not shape)
Review S03: test isolation, fixture quality, semantic correctness of assertions, real-gate-not-skipped coverage
Global review across S01 + S03: validator + tests compose into a complete fix; AC1-AC5 covered end-to-end
